text:
A.T. EVA01 Reference CD is an album that is a collection of previously released singles. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number SSX-10121, and was released on 27 December 2007. https://vgmdb.net/album/35770 

It came enclosed with the A.T. EVA01 headphones for initially 24,800 yen. http://www.yesasia.com/us/evangelion-original-headphone-a-t-eva01-scrh-00006/1011113961-0-0-0-en/info.html
